epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical assessment with imaging for suspected tears or refractory symptoms; structured physiotherapy pathways common

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: tens of millions with episodic shoulder pain
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to physiotherapy and imaging; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Broad access to physiotherapy and imaging in many systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Exercise-based rehab, NSAIDs, injections, and surgery for tears when indicated
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Wait times for elective imaging/surgery in some systems
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong conservative care pathways and rehab access in many member states
